title: Mobicool Electric Cooler 24L — 12V & 230V
short_description: Practical 24L cooler for car and socket. Cools up to 18°C below ambient temperature. Quiet, lightweight, with carrying handle.
long_description: The Mobicool cooler keeps food and drinks reliably fresh — at the campsite via 230V socket, on the go via 12V car adapter. With a volume of 24 liters, it offers enough space for weekend shopping. The quiet cooling system and practical carrying handle make it the perfect companion for any camping trip.
features: Cools up to 18°C below ambient temperature
buying_angle: Especially appealing for campers who value practical features: 24L capacity, 12V & 230V operation, cools up to 18°C below ambient temperature.
meta_description: Overview of the Mobicool Electric Cooler 24L - 12V & 230V: 24L capacity, 12V & 230V operation, cools up to 18°C below ambient. A practical option.
pinterest_description: Mobicool Electric Cooler 24L - 12V & 230V: a useful idea for camping, outdoor, and weekend trips. Save this find for your next adventure. #camping #outdoor #campinggear
